records.description: Routes public narration toward broadcast only when route binding, egress signal, audio safety, and claim gates are witnessed.

witness_requirements.description: Broadcast semantic route plus marker or audio energy observed at broadcast egress.
Factual narration has a grounding gate result before public use.

fallback.reason: Public narration remains private or dry-run until egress and no-leak witnesses pass.

records.notes: Audio is the reference slice for no-false-grounding route truth.

records.description: Observes camera/compositor frame availability without claiming visibility until fresh nonblank frame and privacy posture are witnessed.

witness_requirements.description: A fresh nonblank frame with camera role and privacy/egress posture.

fallback.reason: Camera remains dry-run visible until fresh nonblank frame evidence exists.

records.notes: This row references camera/compositor truth but does not touch cx-cyan mobile/compositor code paths.

records.description: Observes individual studio RGB camera frames as internal visual evidence without treating camera presence as public-safe output.

witness_requirements.description: Each used camera role has a fresh nonblank frame and privacy posture evidence.

fallback.reason: Camera fleet evidence remains internal/private until fresh frame, privacy, and public-gate evidence is supplied.

records.notes: Camera hardware and frame existence do not imply public-safe or monetizable status.

records.description: Represents the viewer-visible composed output and requires egress, privacy, consent, audio, rights, and public-event evidence before public claims.

witness_requirements.description: Composed frame, public egress resolver, and public-event evidence agree within the live output TTL.
Face/privacy, consent, rights, and provenance floors are attached before public visual claims.

fallback.reason: Viewer-visible output remains dry-run/private until public egress and public-event evidence pass.

records.notes: Compositor output can be live-visible while still not public-safe or monetizable without separate gates.

records.description: Recalls replay/archive artifacts only when path, hash, mtime, rights, and programme provenance are present.

witness_requirements.description: Replay sidecar has path or object id, hash, mtime, programme/run ids, and rights/provenance refs.

fallback.reason: Archive conversion remains private/archive-only until sidecar evidence is supplied.

records.notes: Archive rows are recall surfaces, not proof of public release.

records.description: Recalls HLS segment sidecars as archive evidence only when path, hash, mtime, temporal span, rights, and privacy refs are supplied.

witness_requirements.description: HLS sidecar has segment path, hash, mtime, temporal span, rights, privacy, and programme boundary refs.

fallback.reason: HLS archive sidecars remain archive-only until supplied evidence and public-event conversion pass.

records.notes: HLS sidecar existence never implies a public replay URL or public-safe status.

records.description: Represents a replay URL derived from archive evidence only after archive replay, temporal span, egress, rights, privacy, audio, and public-event gates pass.

witness_requirements.description: Archive replay adapter emitted a public URL through RVPE with fresh egress and gate evidence.
Archive source refs, rights, privacy, provenance, and audio safety are attached before public replay.

fallback.reason: VOD replay remains archive-only until public URL, RVPE, egress, rights, privacy, and audio evidence pass.

records.notes: A VOD/HLS archive is not public or monetizable until the replay public-event adapter emits evidence.

records.description: Represents YouTube, statuslog, RSS, social, and chapter/cuepoint apertures without accepting public claims until public-event policy passes.

witness_requirements.description: Public event id plus adapter acceptance or explicit dry-run refusal reason.
Rights, privacy, provenance, and gate evidence are present before public fanout.

fallback.reason: Public apertures remain private/dry-run until ResearchVehiclePublicEvent acceptance and gates pass.

records.notes: Public apertures consume ResearchVehiclePublicEvent; they do not scrape private state.

records.description: Represents the active YouTube live URL and ingest state only when egress, audio, privacy, rights, and public-event evidence are fresh.

witness_requirements.description: Active live URL, YouTube ingest proof, egress resolver, and RVPE refs agree within TTL.
Rights, privacy/consent, audio safety, and provenance evidence are attached before public-live use.

fallback.reason: YouTube live aperture remains private/dry-run until URL, ingest, egress, audio, rights, privacy, and public-event witnesses pass.

records.notes: A live URL or camera stream is not enough to claim public-safe or monetizable status.

records.description: Represents public replay URLs emitted from archive replay decisions with explicit archive, temporal-span, egress, rights, privacy, audio, and RVPE evidence.

witness_requirements.description: Public replay URL is backed by RVPE and egress/gate evidence.
Archive source sidecar, temporal span, rights, privacy, audio, and provenance evidence are attached.

fallback.reason: Archive replay aperture remains archive-only until public URL, RVPE, archive, egress, audio, rights, and privacy witnesses pass.

records.notes: Replay URL state is public only when emitted by the archive replay public-event adapter.

records.description: Reads local file and Obsidian task/spec surfaces as supplied evidence with path, hash, mtime, and privacy constraints.

witness_requirements.description: File or note path, hash, mtime, and privacy classification are captured.

fallback.reason: Local file and Obsidian evidence remains private unless explicit public-safe evidence is supplied.

records.notes: Single-operator vault/file state is supplied evidence, not source acquisition.

records.capability_name: Browser and MCP tool read surface
records.description: Captures browser/MCP/tool observations as source-conditioned evidence only when tool responses, errors, citations, and replay refs are preserved.

witness_requirements.description: Tool output includes source items, retrieval time, tool errors, citations, and replay refs.

fallback.reason: Browser/MCP tool output cannot ground claims until source and error capture is preserved.

records.notes: Tool selection is not source acquisition proof.

records.description: Routes MIDI/music expression only with target port binding and dispatch witnesses; it carries no factual claim authority by default.

witness_requirements.description: Target MIDI/music port binding plus command dispatch outcome; feedback where available.

fallback.reason: MIDI/music controls no-op with explanation until port binding and dispatch evidence exists.

records.notes: This record references music/MIDI surfaces without touching cx-blue music implementation paths.

records.description: Observes phone/watch context as private operator telemetry with freshness and privacy witnesses before scheduler or director use.

witness_requirements.description: Recent phone/watch state exists and remains private operator telemetry.

fallback.reason: Mobile/watch context stays private and unavailable to public claims when freshness is missing.

records.notes: Single-operator telemetry only; no multi-party abstraction is introduced.
